extra.reason: A1 shipped: profile=true kwarg on gpu_render_volume returns (image, timing::NamedTuple) with upload_ms/kernel_ms/accum_ms/readback_ms/total_ms. Readback timer isolated to D2H transfer (not CPU reshape). Zero new sync barriers on profile=false hot path. 20 tests green. Reviewer pass completed; 4 revisions applied.

C1 complete: GPUNanoGrid{B,BUF,TF,L} struct defined with backend + device nanovdb buffer + tf_lut + lights. 6 RED→GREEN tests in test/test_gpu_nanogrid.jl. No regression in test_gpu.jl (pre-existing Julia 1.12 UndefVarErrors only) or A1 instrumentation (20/20 pass).

A2 complete: bench/perf_baseline.jl + test + bench/results/2026-04-19.json captured on RTX 3090. 72/72 tests pass at 32x32 smoke config. Real baseline at 800x600 spp=8: kernel is 95-98% of wall time across 3 scenes (smoke.vdb 917 ms, bunny_cloud 1269 ms, level_set_sphere 2626 ms). Substituted Schwarzschild thin disk with bunny_cloud.vdb because A1 profile=true instruments gpu_render_volume only (not gpu_gr_render). See WORKLOG 2026-04-19 for implications — kernel bucket is the only 95% target, so E1 (CuTexture) likely deserves promotion above C/D.
